designNotes.skillBaseline: Summon 4 fetish warriors (6s duration, 10s CD). Fragile (10% player max HP each), high DPS (0.25 SPR per attack, 1.5s interval), physical element. While alive, fetishes create spirit_link state for Mass Sacrifice consume.

buildIdentities.plague_doctor: Fetish hits apply DoTs — chaos converts physical, every hit a poison/bleed apply.
buildIdentities.spirit_caller: More fetishes, longer duration, frenzy stacking. The pack snowballs through fights.
buildIdentities.voodoo_master: Fetishes feed soul stacks and burst payoffs — crit-driven, hex-amplified.

branches.theme: Fetishes carry plague — every dart applies a debuff, pack as a debuff distribution swarm.

nodes.name: Venom Darts
nodes.description: +15/30% fetish damage AND fetish hits convert 50% physical to chaos.
engineFields: fetishDamageMult (NEW — numeric; staff.ts summonMinions for fetish multiplies damage by 1 + value/100); rawBehaviors.fetishPhysToChaosPercent (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: convert that % of physical damage to chaos)

nodes.name: Toxic Hits
nodes.description: Fetish hits have 15/30% chance to apply Poisoned (3s).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.fetishHitPoisonChance (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook for fetish: roll, apply poisoned)

nodes.name: Plague Darts
nodes.description: Every 4th fetish hit on a target applies 1 stack of Plagued (5s).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.fetishEveryNAppliesPlagued (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: per-fetish per-target counter, on Nth hit apply plagued)

nodes.name: Pack Plague
nodes.description: +5/10% damage per debuff on target.

nodes.name: Disease Synergy
nodes.description: +15/30% fetish damage on Plagued targets.

nodes.name: Bleed Darts
nodes.description: Fetish critical strikes apply 1/2 stacks of Bleeding (3s).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.fetishCritBleedingStacks (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: on fetish crit, apply N stacks bleeding)

nodes.name: Chaos Mastery
nodes.description: +10/20% chaos penetration.

nodes.name: Plague Volley
nodes.description: Each fetish attack also hits 1 random adjacent enemy at 50% damage with the same DoT-application rolls.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.fetishAttackSplashTargets + Percent (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: per attack, emit damage event to N adjacent at percent/100, replay DoT-application rolls)

nodes.name: DoT Support
nodes.description: +15/30% damage to DoT-tagged skills.

nodes.name: Toxic Bond
nodes.description: All DoTs applied by fetishes have +75% duration. Cost: −20% fetish damage.

nodes.name: Plague Conduit
nodes.description: Every 5 seconds, fetishes apply ALL of your active DoTs to their target. Cost: fetish duration −2s.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.fetishPlagueConduitSeconds (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: per-fetish 5s timer, apply all active DoTs); fetishDurationPenaltySeconds (NEW — staff.ts summonMinions for fetish: subtract from duration)

nodes.name: Death Cloud
nodes.description: When a fetish dies, it leaves a 3s poison cloud (deals 50% of fetish max HP as chaos DoT to enemies inside).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.fetishDeathPoisonCloud (NEW — minions.ts on fetish death: spawn temporary debuff on pack neighbors that ticks for fetish.maxHp * percent/100 over duration)

nodes.name: THE PESTILENCE
nodes.description: All fetish hits apply 1 stack each of Poisoned and Bleeding. Cost: fetish max HP −50%.

branches.theme: More fetishes, faster attacks, frenzy snowballing. The swarm grows on every kill.

nodes.name: Extra Fetish
nodes.description: +1/2 extra fetishes summoned.

nodes.name: Frenzy Building
nodes.description: Each fetish kill grants the pack +1/2% attack speed (stacks up to 20%, resets when no fetish alive).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.fetishFrenzyStacking (NEW — tick.ts death loop: if killer was fetish, increment per-pack frenzy counter; minions.ts uses it as attackInterval multiplier; reset when activeFetishes=0)

nodes.name: Lingering Pack
nodes.description: +50% fetish duration (6s → 9s).

nodes.name: Quick Strike
nodes.description: +15/30% fetish attack speed.
engineFields: fetishAttackSpeedMult (NEW — numeric; staff.ts summonMinions for fetish multiplies attackInterval by 1/(1 + value/100))

nodes.name: Pack Hunter
nodes.description: +15/30% damage while 3+ minions alive.

nodes.name: Spawn Spawn
nodes.description: Fetish kills have 15/30% chance to spawn a 3s spirit minion.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.fetishKillSpiritSpawnChance (NEW — tick.ts death loop: if killer was fetish, roll chance, summonMinions spirit_temp)

nodes.name: Persistent Pack
nodes.description: +15/30% fetish max HP.

nodes.name: Dog Spawn
nodes.description: When a fetish dies, 25% chance to spawn a Zombie Dog (5s duration).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.fetishOnDeathSpawnDog (NEW — minions.ts on fetish death: roll chance, summonMinions zombie_dog with duration override)

nodes.name: Minion Mastery Support
nodes.description: +15/30% minion damage.

nodes.name: Swarm of Eight
nodes.description: +4 extra fetishes (8 total). Cost: fetish damage −30%.

nodes.name: All-Frenzy
nodes.description: Frenzy stacking max raised to 50% AND each minion (not just fetish) kill grants 1 stack. Cost: fetish max HP −30%.

nodes.name: Brood Mother
nodes.description: When you cast Fetish Swarm, also summon 1 Zombie Dog (5s).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.fetishCastSummonsDog (NEW — staff.ts postCast for staff_fetish_swarm: summonMinions zombie_dog count=1 with duration override)

nodes.name: THE BLOOD CULT
nodes.description: Fetishes are permanent (auto-resummon when all dead, 5s delay). Cost: max 2 fetishes instead of 4.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.fetishPermanentMode (NEW — staff.ts tickMaintenance: if no fetishes alive AND timer > delay, auto-summon); extraFetishCount (EXISTS, negative)

branches.theme: Crit-driven, soul-stack feeders. Fetishes empower your own burst skills.

nodes.name: Sharp Darts
nodes.description: +10/20% fetish critical strike chance.
engineFields: fetishCritChance (NEW — numeric; tick.ts minion attack hook for fetish: critChance += value/100)

nodes.name: Soul Darts
nodes.description: Fetish hits have 5/10% chance to generate 1 soul_stack. ICD 1s.

nodes.name: Pack Catalyst
nodes.description: On Fetish Swarm cast: generate 2 soul_stacks immediately.

nodes.name: Hex Synergy
nodes.description: +15/30% damage on Hexed targets.

nodes.name: Stack Synergy
nodes.description: +5/10% fetish damage per active soul_stack.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.fetishDamagePerSoulStack (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: fetish damage *= 1 + soulStackStacks * value/100)

nodes.name: Crit Soul
nodes.description: Fetish critical strikes have 35/70% chance to generate 1 soul_stack. ICD 1.5s.

nodes.name: Quickdraw
nodes.description: −15/30% Fetish Swarm cooldown.

nodes.name: Predator Pack
nodes.description: Fetish critical strikes also crit on the next 2 attacks (per fetish).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.fetishCritCascadeAttacks (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: per-fetish crit-cascade counter, force crit for next N attacks)

nodes.name: Burst Mastery
nodes.description: +20/40% damage to Heavy-tagged skills.

nodes.name: Glass Cannons
nodes.description: Fetishes deal +75% damage. Cost: fetish max HP −50%.

nodes.name: Soul Bond
nodes.description: Each soul_stack you have grants +15% fetish damage (uncapped). Cost: Fetish Swarm CD +3s.

nodes.name: Pack Resonance
nodes.description: When you crit any skill, all fetishes immediately attack the same target (resets their attack timers).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.playerCritTriggersFetishPackAttack (NEW — tick.ts post-crit hook: set all fetish minion nextAttackAt to now)

nodes.name: THE FETISH KING
nodes.description: 1 fetish becomes a Fetish King: 4× damage, 4× HP, 50% slower attacks, can crit. Cost: only 1 fetish (instead of 4).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.fetishKingMode (NEW — staff.ts summonMinions for fetish: count=1, apply mults); extraFetishCount (EXISTS, negative)
